steps.title: Find both volumes
steps.content:
The cube volume is
$$
78^3=474{,}552
$$
The sphere radius is $39$, so its volume is
$$
\frac{4}{3}\pi(39)^3\sim248{,}475
$$

steps.title: Subtract the sphere
steps.content: The space not taken up by the sphere is $$ 474{,}552-248{,}475=226{,}077 $$ The answer is A.
